item_name: G75T60AK3. IGBT
description: Good question. Here’s a detailed description of the G75T60 IGBT (which appears to be the marking for Infineon’s IGW75N60T) — plus its key features, technology, and typical applications.---Description of G75T60 / IGW75N60T IGBT1. Type & TechnologyThe G75T60 is an Insulated-Gate Bipolar Transistor (IGBT).It uses Infineon’s TRENCHSTOP™ and Fieldstop technology, which helps in lowering conduction losses and improving switching performance. This combination (trench + fieldstop) provides: tight parameter distribution, ruggedness (durability), temperature stability, and high-speed switching. 2. Electrical CharacteristicsRated for 600 V collector-emitter voltage (V CE ) Continuous collector current (at certain case or junction-temperatures) is high (75 A spec marking, but datasheet gives more detail on pulse current). Saturation voltage (V CE(sat) ) typical ~1.5 V at Tj = 25 °C. Gate-emitter voltage max ±20 V. Short-circuit withstand time: ~5 microseconds under certain conditions. 3. Thermal / Power CharacteristicsMaximum junction temperature: 175 °C. Power dissipation (case, T_C = 25°C) can reach ~428 W. Thermal resistance junction-to-case is very low, allowing efficient heat transfer. 4. Switching PerformanceOptimized for low switching losses, which is good for efficient power conversion. Gate charge is relatively low, making gate drive easier / more efficient. Has a soft-recovery, emitter-controlled diode integrated, which reduces the turn-on loss and helps with efficient energy recovery. Positive temperature coefficient in V CE(sat) — this is helpful when paralleling devices: as temperature rises, conduction resistance increases, which helps current sharing. 5. PackageIt's packaged in a TO-247-3 (3-pin) package. This package is good for high-power IGBTs because it allows decent heat sinking and good mounting.6. Reliability / RuggednessHigh ruggedness and temperature-stable behavior. The design is meant for hard-switching applications, meaning it can handle switching between on/off under relatively tough conditions. Qualified according to JEDEC for target applications. 7. ApplicationsAccording to Infineon, the typical use-cases include:Frequency converters (inverters) Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS) More broadly, it’s suitable for motor drives, renewable energy (solar/wind inverters), industrial power electronics, and general high-power switching systems. 8. Compliance & EnvironmentalPb-free lead plating, RoHS compliant. Very tight parameter distribution (i.e., good quality control in manufacturing), which helps in designing reliable power circuits. ---In Simple Terms (Lay Description)The G75T60 (IGW75N60T) is a power transistor that combines the easy control of a MOSFET (via its gate) with the high-current / high-voltage capability of a bipolar transistor — that’s what IGBT means.It’s very efficient: when it’s turned on, it has a relatively low voltage drop (so less wasted heat), and when switching, it also doesn’t lose too much energy.It’s built to work in high-power systems, such as inverters (for solar or motor drives) or power supplies, where you need to switch large currents at high voltages.It can tolerate high temperatures (up to 175 °C at the junction) and has good protection for short, dangerous conditions (short-circuit resilience).Its package (TO-247) makes it somewhat easier to mount on a heatsink, which is essential for dissipating the heat it will generate under load.---If you like, I can compare G75T60 / IGW75N60T with similar IGB

Electrical CharacteristicsRated for 600 V collector-emitter voltage (V CE ) Continuous collector current (at certain case or junction-temperatures) is high (75 A spec marking, but datasheet gives more detail on pulse current). Saturation voltage (V CE(sat) ) typical ~1.5 V at Tj = 25 °C. Gate-emitter voltage max ±20 V. Short-circuit withstand time: ~5 microseconds under certain conditions. 3. Thermal / Power CharacteristicsMaximum junction temperature: 175 °C. Power dissipation (case, T_C = 25°C) can reach ~428 W. Thermal resistance junction-to-case is very low, allowing efficient heat transfer. 4. Switching PerformanceOptimized for low switching losses, which is good for efficient power conversion. Gate charge is relatively low, making gate drive easier / more efficient. Has a soft-recovery, emitter-controlled diode integrated, which reduces the turn-on loss and helps with efficient energy recovery. Positive temperature coefficient in V CE(sat) — this is helpful when paralleling devices: as temperature rises, conduction resistance increases, which helps current sharing. 5. PackageIt's packaged in a TO-247-3 (3-pin) package. This package is good for high-power IGBTs because it allows decent heat sinking and good mounting.6. Reliability / RuggednessHigh ruggedness and temperature-stable behavior. The design is meant for hard-switching applications, meaning it can handle switching between on/off under relatively tough conditions. Qualified according to JEDEC for target applications. 7. ApplicationsAccording to Infineon, the typical use-cases include:Frequency converters (inverters) Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS) More broadly, it’s suitable for motor drives, renewable energy (solar/wind inverters), industrial power electronics, and general high-power switching systems. 8. Compliance & EnvironmentalPb-free lead plating, RoHS compliant. Very tight parameter distribution (i.e., good quality control in manufacturing), which helps in designing reliable power circuits. ---In Simple Terms (Lay Description)The G75T60 (IGW75N60T) is a power transistor that combines the easy control of a MOSFET (via its gate) with the high-current / high-voltage capability of a bipolar transistor — that’s what IGBT means.It’s very efficient: when it’s turned on, it has a relatively low voltage drop (so less wasted heat), and when switching, it also doesn’t lose too much energy.It’s built to work in high-power systems, such as inverters (for solar or motor drives) or power supplies, where you need to switch large currents at high voltages.It can tolerate high temperatures (up to 175 °C at the junction) and has good protection for short, dangerous conditions (short-circuit resilience).Its package (TO-247) makes it somewhat easier to mount on a heatsink, which is essential for dissipating the heat it will generate under load.---If you like, I can compare G75T60 / IGW75N60T with similar IGB

item_name: 16050020 Suppply transformer
description: ### **Chopper Transformer Highlights**1. **Purpose**: - **Voltage Conversion**: The primary function is to step up or step down the voltage in switching power supplies or chopper circuits, adapting the voltage levels to match system requirements. - **Isolation**: Provides electrical isolation between the input and output, enhancing safety and reducing noise.2. **Operation**: - **Switching Mode**: Operates in a chopper circuit where the transformer is part of a high-frequency switching process. The transformer’s design allows efficient energy transfer despite the high switching frequencies. - **Pulse Modulation**: Converts the pulse-width modulated (PWM) signals from the chopper circuit into the desired voltage levels.3. **Construction**: - **Core**: Typically uses a high-frequency ferrite core or laminated silicon steel core to handle the high switching frequencies and reduce core losses. - **Windings**: Includes primary and secondary windings designed to handle specific voltage and current levels. The number of turns in these windings determines the voltage transformation ratio. - **Insulation**: Equipped with insulation materials to handle the high voltages and protect against electrical interference.4. **Types**: - **Flyback Transformer**: Common in isolated chopper circuits, used in applications like power supplies where voltage isolation and voltage conversion are required. - **Forward Transformer**: Used in forward-mode chopper circuits for applications requiring higher power and efficiency.5. **Applications**: - **Switching Power Supplies**: In devices where high-frequency switching is used to convert power efficiently. - **DC-DC Converters**: Found in systems needing voltage transformation and isolation. - **Inverters**: Used in various inverter designs for voltage conversion and isolation in renewable energy systems.
description_original: ### **Chopper Transformer Highlights**1. **Purpose**: - **Voltage Conversion**: The primary function is to step up or step down the voltage in switching power supplies or chopper circuits, adapting the voltage levels to match system requirements. - **Isolation**: Provides electrical isolation between the input and output, enhancing safety and reducing noise.2. **Operation**: - **Switching Mode**: Operates in a chopper circuit where the transformer is part of a high-frequency switching process. The transformer’s design allows efficient energy transfer despite the high switching frequencies. - **Pulse Modulation**: Converts the pulse-width modulated (PWM) signals from the chopper circuit into the desired voltage levels.3. **Construction**: - **Core**: Typically uses a high-frequency ferrite core or laminated silicon steel core to handle the high switching frequencies and reduce core losses. - **Windings**: Includes primary and secondary windings designed to handle specific voltage and current levels. The number of turns in these windings determines the voltage transformation ratio. - **Insulation**: Equipped with insulation materials to handle the high voltages and protect against electrical interference.4. **Types**: - **Flyback Transformer**: Common in isolated chopper circuits, used in applications like power supplies where voltage isolation and voltage conversion are required. - **Forward Transformer**: Used in forward-mode chopper circuits for applications requiring higher power and efficiency.5. **Applications**: - **Switching Power Supplies**: In devices where high-frequency switching is used to convert power efficiently. - **DC-DC Converters**: Found in systems needing voltage transformation and isolation. - **Inverters**: Used in various inverter designs for voltage conversion and isolation in renewable energy systems.
description_augmented: This compact supply transformer features a striking bright yellow winding wrapped securely around a sturdy black rectangular base. The design is industrial and precise, with silver-toned metal pins protruding from the top and bottom for easy integration into your electronic circuits. Each unit comes with a clear identification label on top, ensuring you have the correct part for your repairs. Ideal for those looking for a reliable 16050020 supply transformer, this component is built for stability and efficiency. Whether you are a professional technician or a DIY electronics enthusiast in Pakistan, this durable part is a perfect fit for your next project.

item_name: car radiator cap - r-126 japan few
description: A radiator pressure cap keeps the system pressure at 16 PSI, which avoids the coolant from boiling off even when it gets hotter considerably. Because liquid expands as it gets hotter, the pressure cap allows coolant to escape to a reservoir tank when it expands. This is to keep a proper amount of coolant in the radiator when it expands. The radiator pressure cap prevents trapping of air in the cooling system. The air in the system will cause poor cooling and cause corrosion to the cooling system components. The coolant in the external reservoir will be pulled back, leaving no room for air. The pressure cap is an important component of the proper working of an engine. it should be periodically inspected and consider a replacement if it fails. Ensure 5o/5o water and anti-freeze agent is used. Leaking Coolant White Streaks on Radiator Overflowing Reservoir Radiator Hose Collapses
description_original: A radiator pressure cap keeps the system pressure at 16 PSI, which avoids the coolant from boiling off even when it gets hotter considerably. Because liquid expands as it gets hotter, the pressure cap allows coolant to escape to a reservoir tank when it expands. This is to keep a proper amount of coolant in the radiator when it expands. The radiator pressure cap prevents trapping of air in the cooling system. The air in the system will cause poor cooling and cause corrosion to the cooling system components. The coolant in the external reservoir will be pulled back, leaving no room for air. The pressure cap is an important component of the proper working of an engine. it should be periodically inspected and consider a replacement if it fails. Ensure 5o/5o water and anti-freeze agent is used. Leaking Coolant White Streaks on Radiator Overflowing Reservoir Radiator Hose Collapses

item_name: Eco OBD2 & Nitro OBD2 Gasoline Plug & Drive Performance for Benzine Eco OBD2 ECU Chip Tuning Box Fuel Saving More Power (Color : Red Diesel) | NitroOBD2 Chip Tuning Box Nitro OBD2 Performance Plug and Drive OBD2 Chip Tuning Works for Diesel Cars (red)
description: It works based OBD2 protocols as remaping the Car's computer ECU. After driving 200 km road total, NitroOBD2 adjusts itself to the car, according to the drivers' habits and always keeps remaping the ECU to increase the performance of engine.According to your driving habits, NitroOBD2 makes new map in the car's computer ECU to increase the performance of your car. As you driving much more KM/Mile, it renews the map. Thus it keeps the vehicle's power and torque increasing.NitroOBD2 is a Chip Tuning Box which can be plugged into OBD2 connector of your car to increase the performance of your car.When it plugged into OBD2 connector, NitroOBD2 receives the information from the car computer ECU. With the received data from ECU, NitroOBD2 adjusts the boost pressure, quantity of fuel, injection timing and pressure to increase the performance of your car.NitroOBD2 Chip Tuning Box does not exceed the manufacturer requirements. It works only within the tolerance of the engine.

item_name:
ANCEL AD610Plus OBD II Car Code Reader Automotive Engine Diagnostic Scan Tool ABS SAS SRS Airbag Crash Data Reset Scanner- EN/FR version

￼

￼

￼

￼

description: [Bidirectional ABS Bleeder] Have you ever had soft brakes after changing the ABS pump or replacing the brake fluid? That's because air got into the ABS system. The AD610plus diagnostic tool can perform the ABS bleeding function to release the air, so that the braking effect will be better and you can drive safely. [SRS Reset Tool] A collision or replacement of the airbag sensor or damage will cause the SRS malfunction light to come on. AD610plus can not only read SRS system fault codes and real-time system data and repair your car by analysis before you send it to the workshop, but also reset the SRS light after repair. [SAS Calibration] If the body steering is not smooth enough while driving, the steering angle sensor has been replaced or there is a short circuit, then you need a vehicle diagnostic tool to help you reset the SAS light. With the steering angle reset function of ANCEL AD610plus, you can regain control of your vehicle and have a good driving experience. [OBD-LEVEL Diagnosis] Save a lot of time and money by diagnosing engine problems and resetting ECL (Engine Check Light). It can not only perform full OBD2 modes, such as read codes, clear codes, view freeze frames, live data streams, I/M testing, O2 sensor testing, On-board monitor testing, retrieve VIN ( Vehicle Identification Number ) and DTC look-up. [Auto VIN +User Defined Charts] Automatic and manual retrieval from VIN allows you to quickly learn about your vehicle's parameters. Please note that not all vehicles support automatic readout. The raw data of the engine, ABS, SRS system read out by the AD610plus is converted into graphs to help you determine the cause of a variety of fault codes faster.

It’s a 5-minute DIY installation that turns any standard helmet into a high-tech smart helmet without any drilling or permanent damage. 【 K06 vs K06A: Choose Your Perfect Ride 】 : Understanding the difference is key to a great experience with FunBug! item_name: Google Pixel 6 Pro 12GB Ram 128/256GB Rom
description: Design and BuildThe Google Pixel 6 Pro boasts a sleek and modern design with premium materials. Its sturdy construction is highlighted by a polished aluminum frame and a Gorilla Glass Victus back and front, offering both durability and a sophisticated look. The phone's dimensions are 163.9 x 75.9 x 8.9 mm, and it weighs 210 grams, providing a balanced feel in the hand.#### DisplayThe Pixel 6 Pro features a stunning 6.7-inch LTPO AMOLED display with a resolution of 1440 x 3120 pixels. This display supports HDR10+ for an enhanced viewing experience with vibrant colors and deep contrasts. It also offers a high refresh rate of 120Hz, ensuring smooth scrolling and an overall fluid user experience.#### PerformanceAt the heart of the Pixel 6 Pro is Google's custom-built Tensor processor, which is designed to deliver exceptional performance and efficiency. Paired with the Mali-G78 MP20 GPU, the device handles intensive tasks and gaming with ease. It comes with 12GB of RAM, allowing for seamless multitasking and swift app transitions.#### StorageThis variant of the Pixel 6 Pro offers a generous 128/256GB of internal storage, providing ample space for apps, media, and files. Please note that the device does not support expandable storage via microSD card.#### Camera SystemThe Google Pixel 6 Pro is equipped with a versatile and advanced camera system:- **Rear Cameras:** - **Main Camera:** 50 MP, f/1.9, 25mm (wide), 1/1.31", 1.2µm, dual pixel PDAF, Laser AF, OIS - **Telephoto Camera:** 48 MP, f/3.5, 104mm (telephoto), 1/2", 0.8µm, PDAF, OIS, 4x optical zoom - **Ultra-Wide Camera:** 12 MP, f/2.2, 17mm (ultra-wide), 1.25µm- **Front Camera:** - 11.1 MP, f/2.2, 20mm (ultra-wide), 1.22µmThis camera setup ensures high-quality photos and videos in various lighting conditions, with features like Night Sight, Super Res Zoom, and 4K video recording.#### Battery and ChargingThe device is powered by a robust 5003mAh battery, supporting fast charging up to 30W, ensuring quick recharges. It also supports 23W wireless charging and reverse wireless charging, allowing you to power other compatible devices.#### ConnectivityThe Google Pixel 6 Pro offers a comprehensive suite of connectivity options, including:- **SIM:** Single Nano-SIM and eSIM- **5G:** SA/NSA/Sub6/mmWave (availability depends on region)- **Wi-Fi:** 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/6e, dual-band, Wi-Fi Direct- **Bluetooth:** 5.2, A2DP, LE, aptX HD- **NFC:** Yes- **USB:** USB Type-C 3.1#### Operating SystemThe phone runs on the latest Android 12 operating system, ensuring the latest features, security updates, and a clean, user-friendly interface.#### SecurityFor security, the Pixel 6 Pro incorporates an under-display fingerprint sensor and robust face unlock technology. It also benefits from Google's Titan M2 security chip, providing an additional layer of hardware security.#### Additional Features- **IP68 Dust/Water Resistance:** The device can withstand submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for 30 minutes.- **Stereo Speakers:** For an immersive audio experience.- **Sensors:** Accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, barometer, and a color spectrum sensor.#### Color OptionsThe Pixel 6 Pro is available in several striking color options, including Stormy Black, Cloudy White, and Sorta Sunny, catering to various style preferences.#### ConclusionThe Google Pixel 6 Pro stands out with its cutting-edge technology, powerful performance, and innovative features, making it a top choice for those seeking a premium smartphone experience. Whether it's the high-quality display, advanced camera system, or robust performance, the Pixel 6 Pro delivers on all fronts.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. item_name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
description: - Detailed Product DescriptionThe Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra is the pinnacle of Samsung’s flagship smartphone lineup, bringing cutting-edge technology, a superior camera system, and unparalleled performance. Built for users who demand the best in every category—whether it’s photography, performance, or display quality—the S24 Ultra delivers an all-around premium experience. Below is a comprehensive breakdown of the specifications and features of the Galaxy S24 Ultra:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 162.3 x 79.1 x 8.6 mmWeight: 234 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 (durable protection for drops and scratches).Back: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2.Frame: Armor Aluminum frame for added durability.Colors: Phantom Black, Phantom White, Green, and Burgundy.The Galaxy S24 Ultra showcases a premium design with sleek lines, curved edges, and a robust yet elegant build. The polished metal frame and matte glass finish create a sophisticated look while ensuring durability.---2. Display:Size: 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X displayResolution: 1440 x 3088 pixels (~500 ppi density), providing extremely sharp visuals.Aspect Ratio: 19.3:9Refresh Rate: 120Hz adaptive refresh rate, which adjusts between 1Hz and 120Hz based on the content, ensuring smooth scrolling while conserving battery life when appropriate.Brightness: Up to 2,500 nits peak brightness, making it one of the brightest displays in the market, ensuring excellent visibility under direct sunlight.HDR Support: HDR10+ support for enhanced color and contrast in supported content.Always-on Display: Yes, offering glanceable information like time, notifications, and more.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 for strong protection against drops and scratches.---3. Performance:Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 (4 nm)Samsung’s choice of Qualcomm’s latest and greatest chipset ensures top-tier performance in AI tasks, gaming, and overall system fluidity. It excels in both speed and energy efficiency.GPU: Adreno 750 for improved graphics performance, delivering a smooth experience in gaming and high-demand applications.RAM: 12GB LPDDR5X RAM, providing ample multitasking capabilities for power users who switch between apps frequently or use demanding applications.Storage: 256GB UFS 4.0 (non-expandable), which offers ultra-fast read and write speeds for loading apps and files quickly.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 200 MP, f/1.7Sensor Size: 1/1.3", 0.6µm pixelsOptical Image Stabilization (OIS): Yes, ensuring stable photos and videos even in motion.Laser Autofocus: Yes, providing precise focus in low-light and fast-moving scenarios.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 12 MP, f/2.2Field of View: 120°, ideal for capturing wide landscapes or group shots.Periscope Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 10 MP, f/4.9Optical Zoom: 10x optical zoomSuper Resolution Zoom: Up to 100x, allowing you to capture details from a distance with Samsung’s Space Zoom technology.Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 10 MP, f/2.4Optical Zoom: 3x optical zoom for versatile mid-range zoom photography.Key Camera Features:8K Video Recording: Up to 30fps, offering ultra-high-definition video capture.4K Video Recording: Up to 60fps with HDR10+ support for dynamic range and color.Nightography: Samsung’s enhanced night mode for clearer, more vibrant shots in low-light conditions.Expert RAW: Enables users to shoot in RAW format for professional-grade photography.Super Steady Mode: Improved video stabilization for shake-free video recording.Front Camera:Resolution: 12 MPAperture: f/2.2Field of View: 90°, wide enough for group selfies or vlogging.Key Features: Dual Pixel autofocus, 4K video at 60fps, AI-driven portrait enhancements, and face retouching options.---5. Battery:Capacity: 5000 mAh, providing all-day battery life even with heavy use.Charging:Wired Charging: 45W fast charging (able to reach 50% charge in around 30 minutes).Wireless Charging: 15W wireless charging (Qi-certified).Reverse Wireless Charging: 4.5W reverse wireless charging, allowing you to charge accessories like Galaxy Buds or other devices.Battery Saving Features: Adaptive Power Saving mode that optimizes power based on usage patterns.---6. Software:Operating System: Android 14 with One UI 6.0One UI 6.0 Features:Personalization: Enhanced customizations with deeper color palettes and theme options.Multitasking Improvements: Split screen and floating windows for improved productivity.Samsung DeX: Turn your Galaxy S24 Ultra into a desktop-like experience with Samsung DeX.Bixby Routines: AI-powered automation that adapts to your habits, offering custom shortcuts for apps and features.Updates: Samsung promises 4 years of major Android updates and 5 years of security updates.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Supports Sub-6 GHz and mmWave 5G networks for ultra-fast download and upload speeds.Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be), ensuring faster internet speeds, low latency, and better coverage.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.3 with A2DP, LE for superior wireless audio quality and quick device pairing.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments and other NFC-related functionalities.USB Port: USB Type-C 3.2, enabling faster charging and data transfer.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM and eSIM), supporting multiple network connections.---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: Ultrasonic in-display fingerprint sensor, offering fast and reliable unlocking even in wet conditions.Face Unlock: Secure face recognition for an alternative biometric unlock method.Samsung Knox: Multi-layered security platform that protects sensitive information from malware and external threats.Secure Folder: A dedicated space on your device for extra-sensitive data.Updates: Samsung offers 5 years of security patches, ensuring your device stays protected from the latest threats.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 water and dust resistance, protecting the phone from splashes, spills, and submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for up to 30 minutes.S Pen Support: Built-in S Pen with improved latency for smooth handwriting and drawing. description_original: - Detailed Product DescriptionThe Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra is the pinnacle of Samsung’s flagship smartphone lineup, bringing cutting-edge technology, a superior camera system, and unparalleled performance. Built for users who demand the best in every category—whether it’s photography, performance, or display quality—the S24 Ultra delivers an all-around premium experience. Below is a comprehensive breakdown of the specifications and features of the Galaxy S24 Ultra:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 162.3 x 79.1 x 8.6 mmWeight: 234 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 (durable protection for drops and scratches).Back: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2.Frame: Armor Aluminum frame for added durability.Colors: Phantom Black, Phantom White, Green, and Burgundy.The Galaxy S24 Ultra showcases a premium design with sleek lines, curved edges, and a robust yet elegant build. The polished metal frame and matte glass finish create a sophisticated look while ensuring durability.---2. Display:Size: 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X displayResolution: 1440 x 3088 pixels (~500 ppi density), providing extremely sharp visuals.Aspect Ratio: 19.3:9Refresh Rate: 120Hz adaptive refresh rate, which adjusts between 1Hz and 120Hz based on the content, ensuring smooth scrolling while conserving battery life when appropriate.Brightness: Up to 2,500 nits peak brightness, making it one of the brightest displays in the market, ensuring excellent visibility under direct sunlight.HDR Support: HDR10+ support for enhanced color and contrast in supported content.Always-on Display: Yes, offering glanceable information like time, notifications, and more.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 for strong protection against drops and scratches.---3. Performance:Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 (4 nm)Samsung’s choice of Qualcomm’s latest and greatest chipset ensures top-tier performance in AI tasks, gaming, and overall system fluidity. It excels in both speed and energy efficiency.GPU: Adreno 750 for improved graphics performance, delivering a smooth experience in gaming and high-demand applications.RAM: 12GB LPDDR5X RAM, providing ample multitasking capabilities for power users who switch between apps frequently or use demanding applications.Storage: 256GB UFS 4.0 (non-expandable), which offers ultra-fast read and write speeds for loading apps and files quickly.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 200 MP, f/1.7Sensor Size: 1/1.3", 0.6µm pixelsOptical Image Stabilization (OIS): Yes, ensuring stable photos and videos even in motion.Laser Autofocus: Yes, providing precise focus in low-light and fast-moving scenarios.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 12 MP, f/2.2Field of View: 120°, ideal for capturing wide landscapes or group shots.Periscope Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 10 MP, f/4.9Optical Zoom: 10x optical zoomSuper Resolution Zoom: Up to 100x, allowing you to capture details from a distance with Samsung’s Space Zoom technology.Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 10 MP, f/2.4Optical Zoom: 3x optical zoom for versatile mid-range zoom photography.Key Camera Features:8K Video Recording: Up to 30fps, offering ultra-high-definition video capture.4K Video Recording: Up to 60fps with HDR10+ support for dynamic range and color.Nightography: Samsung’s enhanced night mode for clearer, more vibrant shots in low-light conditions.Expert RAW: Enables users to shoot in RAW format for professional-grade photography.Super Steady Mode: Improved video stabilization for shake-free video recording.Front Camera:Resolution: 12 MPAperture: f/2.2Field of View: 90°, wide enough for group selfies or vlogging.Key Features: Dual Pixel autofocus, 4K video at 60fps, AI-driven portrait enhancements, and face retouching options.---5. Battery:Capacity: 5000 mAh, providing all-day battery life even with heavy use.Charging:Wired Charging: 45W fast charging (able to reach 50% charge in around 30 minutes).Wireless Charging: 15W wireless charging (Qi-certified).Reverse Wireless Charging: 4.5W reverse wireless charging, allowing you to charge accessories like Galaxy Buds or other devices.Battery Saving Features: Adaptive Power Saving mode that optimizes power based on usage patterns.---6. Software:Operating System: Android 14 with One UI 6.0One UI 6.0 Features:Personalization: Enhanced customizations with deeper color palettes and theme options.Multitasking Improvements: Split screen and floating windows for improved productivity.Samsung DeX: Turn your Galaxy S24 Ultra into a desktop-like experience with Samsung DeX.Bixby Routines: AI-powered automation that adapts to your habits, offering custom shortcuts for apps and features.Updates: Samsung promises 4 years of major Android updates and 5 years of security updates.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Supports Sub-6 GHz and mmWave 5G networks for ultra-fast download and upload speeds.Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be), ensuring faster internet speeds, low latency, and better coverage.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.3 with A2DP, LE for superior wireless audio quality and quick device pairing.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments and other NFC-related functionalities.USB Port: USB Type-C 3.2, enabling faster charging and data transfer.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM and eSIM), supporting multiple network connections.---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: Ultrasonic in-display fingerprint sensor, offering fast and reliable unlocking even in wet conditions.Face Unlock: Secure face recognition for an alternative biometric unlock method.Samsung Knox: Multi-layered security platform that protects sensitive information from malware and external threats.Secure Folder: A dedicated space on your device for extra-sensitive data.Updates: Samsung offers 5 years of security patches, ensuring your device stays protected from the latest threats.---9. item_name: iPhone 11 128GB Dual SIM (Physical + eSIM) PTA Approved
description: The iPhone 11 128GB, featuring a dual PTA-approved physical SIM and eSIM capability, is a powerhouse of technology and innovation. This sleek device boasts a 6.1-inch Liquid Retina HD display, providing vibrant colors and sharp details for an immersive viewing experience. Under the hood, the iPhone 11 is powered by the A13 Bionic chip, ensuring lightning-fast performance and efficient multitasking. The 128GB internal storage capacity allows you to store a vast amount of photos, videos, and apps without worrying about running out of space. Capture stunning moments with the dual 12MP Ultra-Wide and Wide cameras on the rear, equipped with Night mode and 4K video recording. The front-facing 12MP TrueDepth camera supports Face ID for secure and convenient unlocking of your device. Connectivity is a breeze with 4G LTE support, and the dual SIM capability enables you to use both a physical SIM card and an eSIM simultaneously. This flexibility is ideal for those who travel frequently or need separate numbers for personal and professional use. The iPhone 11 ensures a long-lasting battery life, supporting up to 17 hours of video playback. Running on iOS, you'll have access to the latest features, security updates, and a vast array of apps through the App Store.(80% + Battery Health) With its durable glass and aluminum design, the iPhone 11 not only looks stylish but also offers water and dust resistance (IP68). This device redefines what a smartphone can do, delivering a seamless and powerful user experience with cutting-edge technology. item_name: Sony Xperia 5 6GB Ram 64GB Rom Single Sim PTA Approved
description: **Sony Xperia 5 - Compact Powerhouse** Experience the perfect balance of style, performance, and innovation with the Sony Xperia 5. This compact smartphone delivers exceptional features and stunning design, ensuring a seamless user experience. **Sleek Design and Display:**The Xperia 5 features a sleek and compact design that fits comfortably in your hand. Its 6.1-inch Full HD+ OLED display (2520 x 1080 resolution) offers vibrant colors, deep contrasts, and sharp details. The 21:9 CinemaWide aspect ratio provides an immersive viewing experience for movies, games, and more. **Powerful Performance:**Equipped with a Qualcomm Snapdragon 855 processor and 6GB of RAM, the Xperia 5 delivers smooth and responsive performance. Multitask effortlessly, run demanding apps, and enjoy lag-free gaming. The 64GB of internal storage provides ample space for apps, photos, videos, and more. **Advanced Camera System:**Capture stunning moments with precision using the Xperia 5's versatile triple-camera system:- **12MP Wide Camera**: Capture detailed shots with optical image stabilization (OIS).- **12MP Telephoto Camera**: Zoom in without compromising image quality.- **12MP Ultra-Wide Camera**: Take expansive landscapes and group shots. The camera setup supports 4K HDR video recording, ensuring exceptional video quality in any lighting condition. **Enhanced Audio Experience:**Immerse yourself in high-quality audio with Dolby Atmos support. The Xperia 5 delivers rich, immersive sound whether you're listening through headphones or the built-in stereo speakers. **Advanced Connectivity:**Stay connected with 4G LTE support on a single SIM. Enjoy fast download and upload speeds, seamless streaming, and reliable connectivity wherever you go. **Battery and Charging:**Power through your day with the Xperia 5's 3140mAh battery. Adaptive Charging technology extends battery lifespan, while Xperia Adaptive Charging optimizes charging to prevent overcharging and protect battery health. **Software Experience:**Experience a clean and intuitive interface with Android 9 Pie, upgradable to newer versions. Sony's UI enhancements ensure a smooth and user-friendly experience with useful features and customization options. **Additional Features:**- **Side-mounted Fingerprint Sensor**: Conveniently unlock your phone with a touch.- **Game Enhancer**: Optimize performance for gaming with enhanced visuals and reduced distractions.- **Water and Dust Resistance (IP65/68)**: Enjoy peace of mind with a durable, water-resistant design. **Premium Build Quality:**Crafted from high-quality materials, the Xperia 5 exudes sophistication and durability. Its sleek and compact profile makes it ideal for one-handed use and easy portability. **Color Options:**Choose from stylish color options like Black, Grey, Blue, and Red to match your personal style and preferences. **Summary:**The Sony Xperia 5 with 6GB RAM and 64GB ROM is a compact powerhouse that delivers exceptional performance and features. From its stunning display and advanced camera capabilities to its immersive audio experience and sleek design, the Xperia 5 is designed to elevate your smartphone experience. Discover the perfect balance of style and substance with the Sony Xperia 5. (Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. item_name: Google Pixel 6 8GB Ram 128GB Rom
description: Google Pixel 6 (8GB RAM, 128GB Storage) - Detailed Product DescriptionThe Google Pixel 6 is a flagship smartphone that blends cutting-edge hardware with the best of Google's AI-driven software. Powered by Google's first custom-built chipset, Tensor, it redefines what you expect from a smartphone. Here’s a detailed breakdown of the specifications and features of the Pixel 6:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 158.6 x 74.8 x 8.9 mmWeight: 207 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus (providing advanced drop and scratch resistance)Back: Glass with Corning Gorilla Glass 6Frame: Aluminum, which offers a premium and sturdy feel.Colors: Stormy Black, Kinda Coral, and Sorta Seafoam.The Pixel 6 sports a unique and bold design, featuring a camera bar across the back. Its sleek finish and vibrant color options give it a distinct appearance that stands out from the competition.---2. Display:Size: 6.4-inch OLED displayResolution: 1080 x 2400 pixels (~411 ppi density)Aspect Ratio: 20:9Refresh Rate: 90Hz for smooth scrolling and better motion clarity.HDR Support: HDR10+ for enhanced contrast and colors when viewing supported content.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus on the front offers strong protection against scratches and drops.Brightness: Supports high brightness mode for outdoor visibility.---3. Performance:Processor: Google Tensor chip (5 nm)This custom-built chip is designed to enhance AI and machine learning tasks, enabling real-time language translation, improved computational photography, and efficient multitasking.GPU: Mali-G78 MP20, offering a significant boost in gaming and graphical performance.RAM: 8GB LPDDR5 RAM, allowing for smooth multitasking and efficient performance across apps and games.Storage: 128GB UFS 3.1 internal storage (non-expandable), providing fast read/write speeds for quicker app launches and file transfers.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 50 MPSensor Size: 1/1.31" with 1.2µm pixel sizeAperture: f/1.85Optical Image Stabilization (OIS): YesLaser Autofocus: Ensures fast and accurate focusing in low light.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 12 MPAperture: f/2.2Field of View: 114°Key Features:4K Video Recording: Up to 60fpsCinematic Pan: Helps in capturing smooth, cinematic-style video.Night Sight: Industry-leading low-light photography.Magic Eraser: AI-based tool that removes unwanted objects or people from photos.Real Tone: Offers more accurate skin tone rendering for all subjects.Front Camera:Resolution: 8 MPAperture: f/2.0Field of View: 84°Video Recording: 1080p at 30fps.Special Features: Face retouching, portrait lighting, and HDR.---5. Battery:Capacity: 4614 mAh, offering all-day battery life with typical usage.Charging:Wired Charging: 30W fast charging (capable of reaching 50% charge in approximately 30 minutes).Wireless Charging: 21W wireless charging via Pixel Stand (Qi-compatible).Reverse Wireless Charging: Yes, can charge accessories like Pixel Buds or other devices.Battery Saving Features: Adaptive Battery, which prioritizes power for your most-used apps and reduces consumption for apps you rarely use.---6. Software:Operating System: Android 12 (upgradable to future versions with regular updates directly from Google).Pixel-Exclusive Features:Live Translate: Provides real-time translation for messages, media, and in-person conversations.At a Glance: Gives you proactive information, like your next meeting or traffic updates, on your home screen.Material You Design: Dynamic theming that customizes the color of your system interface based on your wallpaper.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Sub-6 GHz (supports most 5G networks for faster internet speeds).Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) with dual-band support for faster and more reliable connections.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.2 with A2DP, LE for high-quality audio and fast device pairing.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments via Google Pay.USB Port: USB Type-C 3.1 for fast charging, data transfer, and audio output.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM and eSIM).---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: In-display optical fingerprint sensor.Face Unlock: No.Titan M2 Security Chip: Ensures protection against hardware attacks, secures passwords, and protects sensitive data.Security Updates: Regular security updates for a minimum of 5 years.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 water and dust resistance, allowing it to survive submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for up to 30 minutes.Stereo Speakers: Dual stereo speakers for an immersive audio experience.No 3.5mm Headphone Jack: Audio is provided via the USB-C port or Bluetooth headphones.Summary:The Google Pixel 6 (8GB RAM, 128GB Storage) is a powerhouse that combines impressive hardware with Google's software smarts. Its custom Tensor chipset, standout camera features, fast performance, and sleek design make it a top contender in the premium smartphone market. It’s ideal for photography enthusiasts, power users, and anyone who appreciates seamless integration with Google’s ecosystem.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will be issued if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)(Important Note 2: This is Not a Brand New Mobile. This is an Imported kit. Minor Used Sometimes Minor Scratches)(Important Note 3: Camera, Touch, LCD, Sensor No warranty. You will be checked before dispatching)

description: Xiaomi, who's working on the latest Redmi A5, has just got the information that they are preparing the future Xiaomi's Redmi A5 handset. As we mentioned above, it is going to be the budget handset of the year due to its amazing specifications and pocket-friendly price bracket. The whole new Xiaomi Redmi A5's a massive 6.88-inch IPS LCD capacitive touchscreen display creating the HD+ resolution of 1080 x 1640 pixels. On the top of that display, there is a punch hole hiding an 8 MP sharp selfie shooter. Also, the Xiaomi A5 offers the single camera setup at the back that consists of 32 mega pixel sensor. Allowing you to enjoy seamless performance will be the powerful Unisoc T7250 (12 nm) processor fitted in the Xiaomi Redmi's A5 with the additional support of a 1.8 GHz Octa Core CPU. Moving into more details, we found that it is going to have 4GB of RAM and 64GB of internal memory capacity. A dedicated memory card slot will also be included. Making the new Xiaomi Redmi A5 perfect for its users is its massive 5200 mAh lithium battery in order to spend the entire day with its users on just one charge. description: Huawei P10 Lite - Following The Fore Fathers Footsteps!Huawei has manged to launch P10 Lite while there is still a lot more open channels are open in front of them. After the launch of flagship carrier now they have started the production of fellowships like Huawei Lite series. Now there is wide chances that the upcoming carrier will make the fleet stronger against the rivals while it will also give them tough time. Huawei P10 Lite is equipped with modern technology that will help him to easily maneuver all its moves in deep sea of top trending smartphones. So far this series i quite popular and Huawei's P10 Lite will be one of those heart winning smartphones. This ship has quite powerful engine where HiSilicon chipset provide a wide space to Huawei P10 Lite's octa core processor to analyze all the information with its ground breaking 2.1 GHz speed. 4GB of RAM is gives perfect opportunity to invade entire fleet of competitors while P10 Lite's housing space is 64 GB which is quite spacious to accommodate all its forces at one place but 256GB SD card support makes upcoming P10 Lite by Huawei perfect vessel for long time battles. Android based OS v7.0 Nougat is used for navigation purposes where on top of that Emotion user interface decorates the 5.5 inch display of Huawei P10's Lite. Finger print sensor is also installed on entrance that protects the ship from reach of enemies without failing for single time. Connectivity of Huawei P10 Lite is based on 3G and 4G LTE networks that will keep the whole system online without any kind of failure or breakage. 12 MP eye is installed on back while 8 MP eye is best for taking HD images.

It is the perfect blend of industrial art and cutting-edge technology for the trendsetting Pakistani user.

item_name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 3 12GB RAM 256 GB ROM || FOLDABLE MOBILE PHONE || ONE YEAR BRAND WARRANTY
description: Samsung is launching a new Galaxy Z that has got the moniker Fold 3 at the end. The company has been experimenting with the folding form factor for over a year now. The first Galaxy Fold was a proof of concept more than anything but the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 2 added more polish to it, tweaked the design, and made the original Fold into something practical, not just a gimmicky party trick. The third generation of this smartphone series is in the works and the rumor mill has already leaked us a core feature of the device, a pop-out keyboard housed inside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 3. This new folding handset will be empowered by one of the latest chipsets available for the smartphones in the market that is called Snapdragon 888 5G (5 nm). Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 3 has got a powerful processor of 3.09Ghz Octa-Core which will boost up this chipset, and generate more power. This is the chipset that carries flagship capability among all the chipsets and will enhance the performance of the coming smartphone. Samsung Galaxy Z's having a 7.6 Inches massive screen size, the users of this device will be enjoying using it. There is a Foldable Dynamic AMOLED 2X Capacitive Touchscreen, with a full HD resolution of 1536 x 2208 Pixels. There is a massive RAM capacity in this new Galaxy Z Fold 3 by Samsung of 12 gigabytes that is something extraordinary. The internal storage capacity of the coming smartphone is 256 gigabytes that are a huge amount of built-in storage that will provide the user with enough space to place its data on the device for future use. The coming smartphone Samsung Z Fold 3 is equipped with a Triple camera setup at the rear. The main sensor will be 12 megapixels. The remaining lenses are yet to confirm. The front-facing camera of Samsung Galaxy's Z Fold 3 is 10 MP + 4 MP. If we talk about the battery of the Galaxy Z Fold 3 so that is also a massive one and it will offer 4400 mAh capacity, which is more than enough for your daily use. item_name: Samsung Galaxy A07 - 6.7'' Display 4GB RAM 64GB/128GB ROM 50MP Rear Camera 25w Fast Charge 5000mAh Battery PTA Approved 1 Year Official Brand Warranty
description: PTA Approved 1 Year Official Brand Warranty The Samsung Galaxy A07 is a budget-friendly 4G smartphone released in late August 2025, featuring a smooth 90Hz display, a durable build with IP54 dust and splash resistance, and a long-lasting battery. It is available in Black, Light Violet, and Green. Processor: A MediaTek Helio G99 6nm octa-core processor offers smoother performance and better power efficiency compared to previous A-series phones. Operating system: It comes with Android 15 and Samsung's One UI 7 out of the box. Software updates: Samsung has committed to providing up to six generations of OS upgrades and six years of security updates. RAM and storage: The phone is available in several configurations, including 4GB of RAM and 64GB/128GB of internal storage. Expandable storage: A dedicated microSD card slot allows for up to 2TB of expandable storage. Display: The 6.7-inch HD+ PLS LCD screen has a 90Hz refresh rate, providing smooth scrolling and viewing for everyday tasks. Design: The slim, 7.6mm body has flat edges and a plastic back. Water and dust resistance: An IP54 rating means the phone can withstand dust and splashes of water. Biometrics: For security, the phone features a side-mounted fingerprint sensor. Rear camera: A dual-camera system includes a 50MP main lens with autofocus and a 2MP depth sensor for portrait shots. Front camera: For selfies and video calls, the phone is equipped with an 8MP front-facing camera. Video recording: The camera can record video at 1080p resolution at 30fps. Capacity: A large 5,000mAh battery provides a full day or more of typical usage. Charging: It supports 25W fast charging via a USB-C port, and a compatible charging brick may be included in the box depending on the region.

item_name: Mi 11 Ultra NON PTA (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
description: The Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra is Xiaomi’s ultimate flagship device, designed to push the boundaries of mobile technology. Packed with top-of-the-line specifications, including an advanced triple camera system, a stunning AMOLED display, and a high-performance chipset, the Mi 11 Ultra is engineered for users who demand nothing less than the best in every aspect. Here’s a detailed breakdown of all the specifications and features:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 164.3 x 74.6 x 8.4 mmWeight: 234 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus for superior protection against scratches and drops.Back: Ceramic back, providing a premium feel and enhanced durability.Frame: Aluminum frame for added strength and style.Colors: Ceramic White and Ceramic Black.The Mi 11 Ultra is designed with a premium ceramic body and a sleek aluminum frame, offering both durability and a luxurious aesthetic. The curved edges and slim profile make it comfortable to hold while exuding elegance.---2. Display:Size: 6.81-inch AMOLED displayResolution: 1440 x 3200 pixels (~515 ppi density), offering ultra-sharp and vibrant visuals with impressive detail.Aspect Ratio: 20:9Refresh Rate: 120Hz refresh rate for smooth scrolling, animations, and an enhanced gaming experience.Touch Sampling Rate: 480Hz touch sampling rate for ultra-responsive touch input, ideal for gaming.Brightness: Peak brightness of up to 1,700 nits, ensuring clear visibility even under direct sunlight.HDR Support: HDR10+ certified, delivering richer contrast and brighter highlights when watching compatible content.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus protects the display from scratches and drops.Secondary Display: 1.1-inch AMOLED screen on the rear, which can be used to check notifications, battery status, and even take selfies using the rear cameras.---3. Performance:Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 (5 nm)The Snapdragon 888 chipset ensures top-tier performance, handling multitasking, gaming, and heavy applications effortlessly with improved energy efficiency and AI capabilities.GPU: Adreno 660 for exceptional graphics performance, perfect for demanding games and graphics-intensive apps.RAM: 12GB LPDDR5 RAM for seamless multitasking, ensuring apps load quickly and switch smoothly without lag.Storage: 256GB UFS 3.1 storage, providing blazing-fast data transfer speeds and ample space for photos, videos, apps, and files.Note: No microSD card slot for expandable storage.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 50 MP, f/1.95, 1/1.12" sensor size, 1.4µm pixel size, offering incredible detail and excellent low-light performance.Optical Image Stabilization (OIS): Yes, ensuring sharp and stable images even when in motion.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 48 MP, f/2.2, 128° field of view, enabling wide-angle shots without losing quality.Periscope Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 48 MP, f/4.1Optical Zoom: 5x optical zoom for distant subjects.Super Zoom: Up to 120x digital zoom with AI enhancements for ultra-zoomed shots.Key Camera Features:8K Video Recording: Up to 24fps, capturing ultra-high-definition footage.4K Video Recording: Up to 60fps with HDR10+ support for superior dynamic range and color accuracy.Night Mode: Enhanced night mode for clear, vivid images in low-light environments.Dual Pixel PDAF & Laser AF: Fast and precise autofocus for photos and videos.AI-Enhanced Photography: Features like AI scene detection, portrait mode, and ultra night video for enhanced photos in all conditions.Secondary Display Camera Mode: The rear display can be used as a viewfinder for selfies, leveraging the superior rear cameras for sharper, higher-quality self-portraits.Front Camera:Resolution: 20 MP, f/2.2Key Features: AI-beautification, portrait mode, and HDR capabilities for enhanced selfies and video calls.Video Recording: 1080p at 30fps.---5. Battery:Capacity: 5000 mAh, providing all-day battery life even with heavy usage.Charging:Wired Charging: 67W fast charging, capable of charging the device to 100% in about 36 minutes.Wireless Charging: 67W fast wireless charging, one of the fastest wireless charging capabilities on the market, reaching 100% in 39 minutes.Reverse Wireless Charging: 10W reverse wireless charging, useful for charging other devices like earbuds or wearables.Battery Saving Features: AI-driven power management that optimizes battery usage based on your habits and app usage.---6. Software:Operating System: MIUI 12.5 based on Android 11, upgradable to newer versions of MIUI and Android.MIUI 12.5 Features:Enhanced Privacy Controls: With granular permissions and features like clipboard access restrictions and secure storage for private files.Customizable Always-On Display: Take advantage of the vibrant AMOLED display to customize always-on features.Multitasking Features: Floating windows and improved split-screen capabilities.Performance Enhancements: Faster response times and better memory management for a smoother experience.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Supports both Sub-6 GHz and mmWave 5G for ultra-fast internet speeds and lower latency on supported networks.Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax), offering faster speeds, better coverage, and reduced latency in crowded areas.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.2, ensuring fast and reliable wireless connections for headphones and other peripherals.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments via Google Pay and other NFC-enabled services.USB Port: USB Type-C 2.0 for charging and data transfer.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM, dual standby), allowing for the use of two networks simultaneously.---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: In-display optical fingerprint sensor, fast and reliable for unlocking your device securely.Face Unlock: AI-powered face recognition for an additional biometric unlocking method.Privacy Features: Built-in privacy controls through MIUI 12.5, offering advanced permissions and secure storage options.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 dust and water resistance, allowing the device to withstand submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for 30 minutes.Stereo Speakers: Tuned by Harman Kardon, providing a rich and immersive audio experience with dual stereo speakers and Dolby Atmos support.IR Blaster: Yes, allowing the phone to control home appliances like TVs and air conditioners.No 3.5mm Headphone Jack: Audio output through USB-C or wireless Bluetooth headphones.---Summary:The Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage) is designed for users who demand the ultimate smartphone experience. Its powerful Snapdragon 888 processor, cutting-edge triple camera system with 120x zoom, and stunning 120Hz AMOLED display ensure top-tier performance in every category. Whether you're capturing professional-grade photos, enjoying fast 5G speeds, or watching HDR10+ content, the Mi 11 Ultra is built to impress. With features like ultra-fast 67W wireless charging, IP68 water resistance, and the secondary rear display, the Mi 11 Ultra redefines what a flagship smartphone can offer.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will be issued if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)(Important Note 2: This is Not a Brand New Mobile. This is an Imported kit. Minor Used Sometimes Minor Scratches)(Important Note 3: Camera, Touch, LCD, Sensor No warranty. You will be checked before dispatching)

Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 50 MP, f/1.95, 1/1.12" sensor size, 1.4µm pixel size, offering incredible detail and excellent low-light performance.Optical Image Stabilization (OIS): Yes, ensuring sharp and stable images even when in motion.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 48 MP, f/2.2, 128° field of view, enabling wide-angle shots without losing quality.Periscope Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 48 MP, f/4.1Optical Zoom: 5x optical zoom for distant subjects.Super Zoom: Up to 120x digital zoom with AI enhancements for ultra-zoomed shots.Key Camera Features:8K Video Recording: Up to 24fps, capturing ultra-high-definition footage.4K Video Recording: Up to 60fps with HDR10+ support for superior dynamic range and color accuracy.Night Mode: Enhanced night mode for clear, vivid images in low-light environments.Dual Pixel PDAF & Laser AF: Fast and precise autofocus for photos and videos.AI-Enhanced Photography: Features like AI scene detection, portrait mode, and ultra night video for enhanced photos in all conditions.Secondary Display Camera Mode: The rear display can be used as a viewfinder for selfies, leveraging the superior rear cameras for sharper, higher-quality self-portraits.Front Camera:Resolution: 20 MP, f/2.2Key Features: AI-beautification, portrait mode, and HDR capabilities for enhanced selfies and video calls.Video Recording: 1080p at 30fps.---5. Battery:Capacity: 5000 mAh, providing all-day battery life even with heavy usage.Charging:Wired Charging: 67W fast charging, capable of charging the device to 100% in about 36 minutes.Wireless Charging: 67W fast wireless charging, one of the fastest wireless charging capabilities on the market, reaching 100% in 39 minutes.Reverse Wireless Charging: 10W reverse wireless charging, useful for charging other devices like earbuds or wearables.Battery Saving Features: AI-driven power management that optimizes battery usage based on your habits and app usage.---6. Software:Operating System: MIUI 12.5 based on Android 11, upgradable to newer versions of MIUI and Android.MIUI 12.5 Features:Enhanced Privacy Controls: With granular permissions and features like clipboard access restrictions and secure storage for private files.Customizable Always-On Display: Take advantage of the vibrant AMOLED display to customize always-on features.Multitasking Features: Floating windows and improved split-screen capabilities.Performance Enhancements: Faster response times and better memory management for a smoother experience.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Supports both Sub-6 GHz and mmWave 5G for ultra-fast internet speeds and lower latency on supported networks.Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax), offering faster speeds, better coverage, and reduced latency in crowded areas.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.2, ensuring fast and reliable wireless connections for headphones and other peripherals.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments via Google Pay and other NFC-enabled services.USB Port: USB Type-C 2.0 for charging and data transfer.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM, dual standby), allowing for the use of two networks simultaneously.---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: In-display optical fingerprint sensor, fast and reliable for unlocking your device securely.Face Unlock: AI-powered face recognition for an additional biometric unlocking method.Privacy Features: Built-in privacy controls through MIUI 12.5, offering advanced permissions and secure storage options.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 dust and water resistance, allowing the device to withstand submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for 30 minutes.Stereo Speakers: Tuned by Harman Kardon, providing a rich and immersive audio experience with dual stereo speakers and Dolby Atmos support.IR Blaster: Yes, allowing the phone to control home appliances like TVs and air conditioners.No 3.5mm Headphone Jack: Audio output through USB-C or wireless Bluetooth headphones.---Summary:The Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage) is designed for users who demand the ultimate smartphone experience. Its powerful Snapdragon 888 processor, cutting-edge triple camera system with 120x zoom, and stunning 120Hz AMOLED display ensure top-tier performance in every category. Whether you're capturing professional-grade photos, enjoying fast 5G speeds, or watching HDR10+ content, the Mi 11 Ultra is built to impress. With features like ultra-fast 67W wireless charging, IP68 water resistance, and the secondary rear display, the Mi 11 Ultra redefines what a flagship smartphone can offer.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. item_name: Motorola Moto Z4 4GB Ram 128GB Rom NON PTA
description: Introducing the Motorola Moto Z4 – a smartphone designed for those who demand versatility and cutting-edge technology in one sleek package. With modular capabilities and impressive features, the Moto Z4 is here to redefine your mobile experience. Key Features: 1. Moto Mods Compatibility: The Moto Z4 supports a range of Moto Mods, allowing you to instantly transform your smartphone into a powerful camera, a speaker system, a projector, and more. Customize your device to suit your needs. 2. Stunning OLED Display: Immerse yourself in a 6.4-inch OLED Full HD+ display that offers rich colors and deep blacks, making every video, game, and photo come to life. 3. Impressive Camera: Capture stunning photos with the 48MP main camera, which features Quad Pixel technology for exceptional low-light performance. The 25MP front camera ensures sharp and vibrant selfies. 4. All-Day Battery Life: With a 3,600mAh battery, the Moto Z4 keeps you powered up throughout the day, and when it's time to recharge, TurboPower gets you back to full capacity quickly. 5. Reliable Performance: Equipped with a Qualcomm Snapdragon 675 processor and 4GB of RAM, the Moto Z4 handles multitasking and demanding apps with ease. 6. Near-Stock Android: Enjoy a near-stock Android experience with minimal bloatware and useful Moto enhancements for a seamless user interface. 7. AI-Powered Features: Benefit from AI-driven capabilities like face unlock and intelligent camera features that enhance your smartphone experience. 8. On-Screen Fingerprint Sensor: Securely unlock your device with the convenience of an on-screen fingerprint sensor. 9. Expandable Storage: Store all your photos, videos, and apps with ease thanks to the expandable storage option. 10. Water-Repellent Design: The Moto Z4 is designed to withstand splashes and light rain, ensuring your device is protected in various conditions. The Motorola Moto Z4 is a modular masterpiece, offering the flexibility to adapt to your changing needs. With a stunning display, impressive camera, and reliable performance, it's the ideal choice for those who crave both innovation and practicality in their smartphone. Elevate your mobile experience with the Moto Z4 today. (Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will issue if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)

item_name: SONY Xperia XZ3 - 4GB /64GB- Official PTA Approved - Original & Water Resistant
description: A beautiful 6.0-inch P-OLED HDR display with sharp 1440 x 2880 resolution Powerful Qualcomm Snapdragon 845 processor for smooth performance 4GB of RAM for multitasking 64GB of storage, expandable with a microSDXC card Long-lasting 3330mAh battery with wireless charging support A 19MP rear camera with 4K HDR video recording and impressive 960fps slow-motion, complemented by a 13MP front camera Android 9.0 Pie software, upgradeable to Android 10 The Xperia XZ3 impressed with its display, performance, and battery life. However, some users felt the camera was average and the design a little plain. Overall, the Xperia XZ3 was a great phone in 2018. With newer models available, it might be worth considering them if you prioritize the latest features or the absolute best camera. If you value a stunning display, strong performance, and long battery life, the Xperia XZ3 remains a good option. Single SIM Condition : Fresh Imported Stock ( But not Box Pack) While it's a few years old now, the Xperia XZ3 is still a solid phone with a lot to offer. If you're looking for a phone with a great screen, long battery life, and a good camera, the XZ3 is a great choice

item_name: Motorola Moto Edge+ 2022 - 8/12GB RAM, 256GB ROM, NON PTA
description: Introducing the Motorola Moto Edge+ 2022, a powerhouse of performance and innovation. Packed with cutting-edge features, this smartphone redefines your mobile experience. **Display:** Immerse yourself in the stunning 6.7-inch AMOLED display, delivering vibrant colors and sharp details. The edge-to-edge design provides an expansive viewing area for an unparalleled visual experience. **Performance:** Equipped with a robust 12GB RAM, the Moto Edge+ 2022 ensures seamless multitasking, allowing you to switch between apps effortlessly. The Qualcomm Snapdragon processor ensures top-notch speed and responsiveness for smooth performance in every task. **Storage:** Store all your memories, apps, and files without a worry with the generous 256GB internal storage. The Moto Edge+ 2022 provides ample space for your photos, videos, and applications, ensuring you have everything you need at your fingertips. **Camera:** Capture life's moments in stunning detail with the advanced camera system. The Moto Edge+ 2022 features a high-resolution main camera, offering exceptional clarity. Whether it's day or night, the camera performs exceptionally well, ensuring your photos are Instagram-worthy every time. **Single SIM Convenience:** Simplify your mobile experience with the single SIM card slot. The Moto Edge+ 2022 offers a streamlined, single SIM setup for those who prefer a more straightforward approach to connectivity. **Battery:** Say goodbye to frequent charging with the long-lasting battery life of the Moto Edge+ 2022. The robust battery ensures you stay connected throughout the day, and when it's time to recharge, the fast-charging feature gets you back in action in no time. **Connectivity:** Stay connected with 5G capabilities, ensuring high-speed internet for streaming, gaming, and browsing. The Moto Edge+ 2022 also supports the latest Bluetooth and Wi-Fi standards for seamless connectivity. **Design:** Crafted with precision, the Moto Edge+ 2022 boasts a sleek and modern design that not only looks great but feels comfortable in your hand. The premium build quality reflects Motorola's commitment to both aesthetics and durability. **Software:** Experience the latest Android operating system, complemented by Motorola's user-friendly enhancements. Enjoy a smooth and intuitive interface that enhances your overall user experience. In summary, the Motorola Moto Edge+ 2022 with 12GB RAM, 256GB ROM, and a single SIM card slot combines powerful performance, ample storage, and a sleek design to elevate your smartphone experience. Whether you're a multitasker, photography enthusiast, or tech aficionado, this device is designed to meet your every need. The "Distraction-Free" Media PlayerSince it still has a 3.5mm headphone jack (a luxury these days!), it’s a perfect dedicated iPod.Music: Load it with FLAC or MP3 files for offline listening without draining your main phone's battery.YouTube/Netflix: Works perfectly over Wi-Fi for bedtime viewing.3. Smart Home ControllerMount it on a wall or leave it on a dock to act as a permanent remote for:Controlling Spotify on your home speakers.Managing Apple HomeKit or Google Home devices.Using it as a dedicated Security Camera monitor.🛠 Quick Optimization TipsSince you are only using Wi-Fi, you should "lean into" that setup to save battery life:Permanent Airplane Mode: Turn on Airplane Mode, then manually turn Wi-Fi back on. This prevents the phone from constantly searching for a SIM signal, which is a massive battery drain.Offload Unused Apps: Go to Settings > General > iPhone Storage and remove anything you don't need to keep the limited RAM snappy.Legacy Apps: If some apps say they require a newer iOS, try downloading them on a newer device first (using the same Apple ID), then go to "Purchased" on the iPhone 6 to download the "Last Compatible Version."

description: Moto G 5G (2024) HighlightsThis model is positioned as an affordable phone that offers 5G connectivity and key modern features.5G Connectivity: Equipped with a Snapdragon 4 Gen 1 chipset for high-speed internet access.Smooth Display: Features a large 6.6-inch screen with a high 120Hz refresh rate for fluid scrolling and visual performance.Large Battery: A robust 5000 mAh battery provides long-lasting power, supported by 18W fast charging.Main Camera: A 50 MP Dual Rear Camera system with Quad Pixel technology for improved low-light photography.Audio Experience: Includes Stereo Speakers with Dolby Atmos® support and a traditional 3.5mm headphone jack.Design & Build: Modern design with a silicone polymer (eco leather) back for a premium look and a water-repellent finish.Storage: Comes with a dedicated microSDXC slot for storage expansion alongside the 128GB internal storage.🇵🇰 Non-PTA Status and Context (Pakistan)The term Non-PTA refers to smartphones imported into Pakistan that have not been approved or registered with the Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) through the official tax payment process.Availability: The Moto G 5G (2024) is generally not officially launched or distributed in Pakistan through authorized channels. It is primarily available as an imported, or "Non-PTA," device.PTA Status & SIM: A Non-PTA phone can typically use a local SIM card for a limited time (usually around 60 days). After this period, the SIM functionality (network calls, mobile data, SMS) is blocked by the PTA until the required import/tax duty is paid to register the device.Tax/Duty (Non-PTA Fix): To use the phone permanently with local SIMs, the owner must pay the PTA-mandated tax duty. The exact tax amount for the Moto G 5G (2024) fluctuates based on the current regulations and the phone's original value.Buying Price: When you buy a "Non-PTA" phone, the price is lower because it does not include the official government taxes/duty, which must be paid separately later if you wish to use local SIMs long-term.

item_name: SPARLIV Multivitamin & Mineral Tablets for Energy Support - 30 Tablets Multi-Pack
description: "Sparliv Men is a multivitamin and mineral supplement that has been formulated with 18 essentials ingredients for the support of male health. Sparliv Men is a combination of Vitamin A, C, D, E, B complex and six key ingredients i.e., Zinc, Selenium, Panax Ginse'ng, Ginkgo Biloba, Tribulus Terristris and L-Arginine. Sparliv is an excellent source to support male health, alertness, energy and vitality throughout the day. Daily fatigue in a men`s life is associated with a busy, hectic lifestyle, and symptoms may include: lack of energy, decreased mental and physical performance, lethargy and lack of concentration. Benefits: Sparliv Men contains power of 18 essential ingredients that Boost Vitality, Energy & Reproductive Health Enhance Body Immunity Improve Muscle function and provide strength Strengthen Cognitive Function Strengthens heart function and supports brain health. Common Side Effects: Generally, this preparation is well tolerated. Diarrhea may occasionally occur during treatment with beta-carotene (Vitamin A precursor) and the skin may assume a slightly yellow discoloration. The side effects of vitamin A are reversible. Vitamin C and vitamin E may cause diarrhea and other gastrointestinal disturbances. Although these side effects are generally mild and go away on their own, if they persist, seek medical attention. Recommended Dosage: Recommended dosage of Sparliv Men is 01 tablet a day orally, or as advised by the physician. Warnings and Precautions For Arginine: Arginine is not recommended for patients following a heart attack. For Ginkgo biloba: As the use of Ginkgo may increase the tendency of bleeding, please consult your physician/ pharmacist if you are on or intend to start using any other medicines and before you undergo any surgical/ dental procedure. For Ginse'ng: Contraindicated in pregnant women. Safe use in lactating women and children has not been established. Do not exceed the stated dose. Safety on long term use has not been established"

For Ginse'ng: Contraindicated in pregnant women. Safe use in lactating women and children has not been established. Do not exceed the stated dose. Safety on long term use has not been established"

Some studies report that it helps people fall asleep more quickly (reduced sleep latency) and improves “subjective” sleep quality (how rested you feel, how you rate the sleep), especially in people with mild insomnia or disturbed sleep. Mayo Clinic+2PubMed+2 Relaxation & stress / anxiety relief — Because valerian is believed to exert a mild sedative/calming effect on the nervous system, it may help reduce stress, tension, or mild anxiety — which in turn can aid relaxation and make it easier to unwind before sleep. WebMD+2Mayo Clinic+2 Mild to moderate insomnia or sleep difficulties (especially short-term / occasional) — For some people experiencing mild sleep issues (rather than chronic or severe insomnia), valerian — particularly when used over several weeks — may offer support, especially when combined with good sleep habits. NCBI+2PubMed+2 Generally well-tolerated when used short-term — Most research suggests valerian root is relatively safe for short-term use at moderate doses (e.g. 300–600 mg per day)

description_augmented: This sleek, space-grey Apple iPad Pro features an incredibly slim profile and a refined matte finish that feels premium in your hand. Its expansive screen is framed by thin, symmetrical bezels, maximizing the view of the stunning Ultra Retina XDR Display. On the rear, the dual-camera setup and LiDAR scanner are neatly integrated into a compact module, while the seamless edges give it a modern, minimalist look. Perfect for professionals and students in Pakistan, this powerful device combines a sophisticated design with Face ID for secure, effortless access, making it the ultimate tool for creativity and productivity on the go.

Press the power button to start the mist and toggle LED light modes. Enjoy refreshing mist and relaxing aromatherapy anytime.
